chapter_title.ar: باب بَيْعِ الْمَاءِ وَ مَنْعِ فُضُولِ الْمَاءِ مِنَ الْأَوْدِيَةِ وَ السُّيُولِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 135 – Selling the water and prevention of wasting the water from the valleys and the streams

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/367)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/367)
text: قَضَى رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فِي سَيْلِ وَادِي مَهْزُورٍ أَنْ يُحْبَسَ الْأَعْلَى عَلَى الْأَسْفَلِ لِلنَّخْلِ إِلَى الْكَعْبَيْنِ وَ لِلزَّرْعِ إِلَى الشِّرَاكَيْنِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Giyas Bin Ibrahim,

from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> judged regarding a waterflow of the valley of Mahzour that the upper part should withhold upon the lower part, for the palm tree up to the (level of) the two ankles, and for the cultivation up to the two shoe-straps’.
en.sarwar: 4. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn Yahya from Ghiyath ibn Ibrahim who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, issued a judgment about the flood water of valley of Mahzur by which those of higher area could hold water for palm trees up to the anklebones and for plantation up to shoelaces.”
